command: $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $totalRAM = [math]::Round($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize/1MB, 2); $freeRAM = [math]::Round($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB, 2); $usedRAM = [math]::Round($totalRAM - $freeRAM, 2); $disk = Get-CimInstance Win32_LogicalDisk -Filter "DeviceID='C:'"; $totalDisk = [math]::Round($disk.Size/1GB, 2); $freeDisk = [math]::Round($disk.FreeSpace/1GB, 2); $usedDisk = [math]::Round($totalDisk - $freeDisk, 2); Write-Output "=== Memory & Storage ==="; Write-Output "RAM Total: $totalRAM GB"; Write-Output "RAM Used: $usedRAM GB"; Write-Output "RAM Free: $freeRAM GB"; Write-Output "RAM Usage: $([math]::Round(($usedRAM/$totalRAM)*100, 1))%"; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "Disk C: Total: $totalDisk GB"; Write-Output "Disk C: Used: $usedDisk GB"; Write-Output "Disk C: Free: $freeDisk GB"; Write-Output "Disk C: Usage: $([math]::Round(($usedDisk/$totalDisk)*100, 1))%"
description: معلومات الذاكرة والتخزين: RAM والقرص C:
